name: Ubiquiti Pocket Keyfob
title: Ubiquiti Pocket Keyfob
short_description: UniFi Pocket NFC Smart Fob, 10-pack. Highly secure NFC smart fob with multi-layer encryption, IP54-rated waterproof casing.
description: The Pocket Keyfob, designated by the manufacture part number UA-Pocket, is a compact and innovative device from Ubiquiti, designed to offer users a convenient and secure way to control and interact with their Ubiquiti access control systems. This small, portable device embodies Ubiquiti's commitment to delivering high-quality, user-friendly technology solutions. Crafted with a sleek, ergonomic design, the Pocket Keyfob fits comfortably in the palm of your hand or easily attaches to a keychain, ensuring it is always within reach when needed. Its compact size belies its robust functionality, providing a simple yet effective tool for managing access to secured areas. The device features a durable construction that is resistant to everyday wear and tear, making it suitable for use in a variety of environments, from office buildings to industrial sites.

detailed_description.heading: Highly secure NFC smart fob that uses multi-layer encryption, including proprietary UniFi Access security protocols.
detailed_description.text: The Pocket Keyfob, designated by the manufacture part number UA-Pocket, is a compact and innovative device from Ubiquiti, designed to offer users a convenient and secure way to control and interact with their Ubiquiti access control systems. This small, portable device embodies Ubiquiti's commitment to delivering high-quality, user-friendly technology solutions.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
Multi-layer encryption
Waterproof, IP54-rated casing
10 x UA Pockets per pack

detailed_description.heading: Design & Durability
detailed_description.text: Crafted with a sleek, ergonomic design, the Pocket Keyfob fits comfortably in the palm of your hand or easily attaches to a keychain, ensuring it is always within reach when needed. Its compact size belies its robust functionality, providing a simple yet effective tool for managing access to secured areas. The device features a durable construction that is resistant to everyday wear and tear, making it suitable for use in a variety of environments, from office buildings to industrial sites.

detailed_description.heading: Integration & Security
detailed_description.text: The Pocket Keyfob is engineered for seamless integration with Ubiquiti's access control systems, facilitating a hassle-free user experience. It operates using secure wireless communication protocols to interact with compatible door locks, gates, and other access points. This allows users to unlock doors or grant access with a simple press of a button, enhancing convenience without compromising security. One of the key advantages of the UA-Pocket is its enhanced security features. It employs advanced encryption methods to safeguard communication between the keyfob and access control systems, ensuring that only authorized users can gain access. This level of security is paramount in today's environment, where the protection of sensitive areas and information is a critical concern. The setup and management of the Pocket Keyfob are designed to be straightforward, allowing for quick and easy pairing with Ubiquiti access control systems. Users can manage their keyfobs through a user-friendly interface, assigning and revoking access permissions as needed. This flexibility makes the device an ideal solution for businesses and organizations of all sizes, accommodating changing access requirements with minimal effort.

detailed_description.heading: Battery Life
detailed_description.text: Battery life is a crucial consideration for any portable device, and the UA-Pocket is designed with efficiency in mind. It features a long-lasting battery that ensures the keyfob remains operational over extended periods, minimizing the need for frequent replacements and ensuring that users have reliable access control at their fingertips.

detailed_description.heading: Conclusion
detailed_description.text: Pocket Keyfob from Ubiquiti is a testament to the brand's ability to combine practicality with advanced technology. With its compact design, robust security features, and seamless integration with access control systems, the UA-Pocket offers a convenient and secure solution for managing access. Whether for personal use or as part of a comprehensive security system in a commercial setting, the Pocket Keyfob represents a versatile and reliable choice for modern access control needs.
